name: Bread Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the bread mix by combining all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Stir the mixture to ensure even distribution of the ingredients.
3. Transfer the mix to an airtight container and label it accordingly.
4. Store the mix in a cool, dry place.
5. Use the bread mix within 6 to 8 months for optimal freshness.
6. This recipe makes about 22 cups of mix.
